title: Implemented scorer commands are omitted from the recognized-command error text
reasoning: The dispatcher has a working scorer adapter when commandTarget resolves to the scorer module, but the error message for other recognized-but-unimplemented commands lists supported commands without mentioning scorer. Users who hit an unimplemented recognized command get inaccurate CLI contract information and may assume scorer is not available.
recommendation: Include the scorer command names or a generic scorer reference in the supported-command message, ideally from the same command metadata used by commandTarget/cliHelpText so this cannot drift again.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests are included for the CLI dispatcher or its user-facing error output.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a CLI dispatcher test for a recognized unimplemented command that asserts the supported-command list includes every implemented adapter family, including scorer.
minimumFixScope: Update the recognized-but-unimplemented error message or derive it from centralized command metadata.
